payload.input: Ethan whimpers, his hips jerking forward at her words, and Vivian’s hand slides lower, her palm cupping his ass with a familiarity that makes him gasp, her fingers dipping between his thighs from behind to find his balls, heavy and tight and drawn up against his body, so different from the men she’s been with, so vulnerable and young.
